cases.policy: Immediately report all accidents, incidents, near misses, property damage, and potentially unsafe conditions.
cases.response: I would report the near miss to my supervisor right away.

cases.policy: Employees must clean spills immediately or block the area and report the hazard.
cases.response: Employees must clean spills immediately or block the area and report the hazard.

cases.policy: Employees must never guess about refund policy. They should check the policy or ask a manager.
cases.response: I would guess and give the customer a refund.

cases.policy: 5. Place the G wire on terminal C.
cases.response: Place the G wire on terminal C.

cases.response: step through all six date/time fields

cases.policy: The Defrost Symbol will illuminate letting you know defrost is in effect.
Use a soft cloth without solvents or abrasive cleaners.
cases.response: I would use abrasive cleaners to scrub it down fast.
